title: Texarkana 1885 instructional alignment seed
teacher_authority_rule: A teacher must confirm the exact TEKS target and final mission framing before classroom use.

alignments.subject_area: historical inquiry / ELAR / social studies bridge
alignments.standard_label: Students must distinguish evidence, inference, and fictional framing through discussion and writing grounded in historical sources.
evidence_expectations: Students inspect cited historical claims before making conclusions.
Teacher highlights the difference between verified fact, source-based inference, and fictional gameplay.
Mission culminates in an evidence-based written or spoken explanation.
alignments.notes: HQIM seed only. This record sets instructional expectations without claiming a final state standards code yet.

alignments.standard_label: Exact TEKS identifier is still pending teacher selection for the final mission frame.
evidence_expectations: Teacher must choose the exact TEKS code before classroom use.
Mission artifacts must map to teacher-approved standards and rubric language.
alignments.notes: No TEKS code is published yet. This keeps the instructional contract explicit without inventing a standards identifier.
